title: geum elatum
intro: Geum elatum, also known as the alpine avens, is a flowering plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Geum elatum has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
